definitions: adj. 沉没的；残骸状态的

examples.text: Nearly three million vessels lie wrecked on the Earth’s ocean floor—from old canoes to the Titanic—and likely less than one percent have been explored.
found the wreck of La Trinité, a 16th-century French vessel that had been at the center
examples.explanation: 发现了“La Trinité”号的残骸；这里 wreck 指沉船或失事船只的残骸。

reviewSessions.example_text: Nearly three million vessels lie wrecked on the Earth’s ocean floor—from old canoes to the Titanic—and likely less than one percent have been explored.
expected_definitions: adj. 沉没的；残骸状态的
reviewSessions.feedback: “破坏”只表达了 wreck 作为动词/名词的相关含义，但例句中 wrecked 指“失事的、沉没的、成残骸的”。
matched_points: 理解到与损坏、破坏有关
missing_points: 未体现例句中形容词 wrecked 的含义
缺少“沉没的/失事的/成残骸状态的”
